task_goal: Create a new contact for Mateo Gonzalez. Their number is +18233846878.
task_goal_rewrite: A new contact entry for Mateo Gonzalez with the phone number +18233846878 exists in the device's contacts application.

checkpoints.description: The contact 'Mateo Gonzalez' is visible in the contacts application's main list view.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing 'Mateo Gonzalez' listed in the contacts app's primary contacts list.

checkpoints.description: The contact's full name field displays exactly 'Mateo Gonzalez' in the contact details view.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot of the contact's detailed profile page showing the name 'Mateo Gonzalez' in the name field.

checkpoints.description: The contact's phone number field displays exactly '+18233846878' in the contact details view.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot of the contact's detailed profile page showing the phone number '+18233846878' associated with the contact.

success_rule: Success is achieved if all three required checkpoints are satisfied, confirming the contact was created with the exact specified name and phone number.
